response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings a long and genuinely broad software engineering career, with real high-scale distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby and recent AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq. However, the resume contains no evidence of the domain expertise that defines this role: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging and rollout automation, experiment assignment and targeting, telemetry foundations, or statistical/data-science collaboration. These are not peripheral nice-to-haves — they are the primary engineering mandate of a Principal Growth/Experimentation Systems role. The candidate also presents at a senior IC scope, without demonstrated principal-level systemic platform ownership that enables multiple teams across products.
strengths: High-scale distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using async I/O, caching, and low-latency patterns directly relevant to telemetry pipeline scale
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq, aligning with the preferred qualification around AI tool adoption for engineering velocity
Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals across a polyglot career (TypeScript, C, C++, Java, DLang) with consistent TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development discipline
concerns: No mention anywhere in the resume of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or experiment assignment and targeting — the central technical domain of this role

No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, growth funnels, or statistical/experimental analysis work, which are required qualifications explicitly called out in both required and preferred sections

Demonstrated impact is at senior individual contributor scope — contributing to team-level projects and codebases — rather than the principal-level systemic platform ownership enabling multiple teams across products that IC6 requires

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth metrics expertise
